sigWerErrors.reason: Difference is only in capitalization, which does not affect meaning in Vietnamese.
The word 'loại' (type) adds a minor detail but does not change the overall meaning of the sentence.
The word 'khi' (when) is redundant in this context and does not change the overall meaning.
'thẻ' (card) is replaced by 'rẫy' (field/farm), which completely changes the meaning and makes the sentence incoherent.
